evals.prompt: Handle three PR review comments: one typo, one failing test claim, and one suggestion that conflicts with an ADR.
evals.expected_output: Reads every comment fully, fixes the typo with verification, investigates the test claim before replying, and pushes back on the ADR conflict with a technical question.
expectations: Does not use performative agreement language
Orders work as blockers, simple fixes, then complex fixes
Includes verification evidence for implemented fixes
Ends with a Status line and explicit blockers or remaining questions
